name: heady-system-build
description: Heady multi-site static website package — 9 sites + auth, shared design system, sacred geometry renderers

sessions.summary: Built complete static multi-site package for the Heady platform: 9 sites (headyme, headysystems, heady-ai, headyos, headyconnection-org, headyconnection-com, headyex, headyfinance, admin-headysystems) + auth.headysystems.com. Shared packages include heady-base.css (1077-line dark glass design system), heady-sacred-geometry.js (7 canvas geometry renderers), heady-shared.js (nav/FAQ/theme/AutoContext/BeeInjector). Auth page features Firebase-ready sign-in/sign-up/reset + relay iframe for postMessage auth sync. Python builder generates all sites from registry JSON. All sites pass visual QA. HeadyMe deployed live.
